summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Ancor.Digital Romanian agency site. All 16 review-request items verified end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL. Page loads in RO by default, RO/EN toggle switches all text instantly without reload, language persists across routes, all nav/CTA links route correctly, portfolio links correctly preventDefault (no navigation), phone link uses tel:+407XXXXXXXX and displays '+40 7XX XXX XXX', mobile menu (hamburger, overlay, mobile-lang-toggle) functions at 375px, and the Emergent badge is fully removed from DOM. All required data-testid attributes are present.
critical_code_review_comments: No issues found. Implementation matches the PRD: RO default, instant client-side language switching via React Context, no images (emoji + CSS/SVG only), no contact form (phone-only display), portfolio cards use href='#' with preventDefault correctly, Emergent badge fully removed from public/index.html.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static React site with React Router v6 + Context-based i18n. No backend. All data-testids verified present: lang-toggle/lang-ro/lang-en, nav-{home,portfolio,about,contact}-link, hero-cta-{primary,secondary}, stat-0..3, about-preview-link, about-feature-row-0..2, process-step-0..2, process-info-box, why-item-0..3, final-cta-{section,button}, portfolio-card-0..3, portfolio-link-0..3, portfolio-cta-{box,button}, team-card-0/1, value-card-0..2, contact-card, contact-phone-link, mobile-menu-button, mobile-menu, mobile-lang-toggle, site-footer, footer-{home,portfolio,phone}-link. Phone displays '📞 +40 7XX XXX XXX' with href='tel:+407XXXXXXXX'. EN toggle correctly renders 'Websites that bring in new clients.' and Home/Portfolio/About Us/Contact nav.
